metadata.name: vault_verifier_aggregate_sum
metadata.description: On-chain Groth16 verifier for the aggregate_sum vault circuit (N=8).

instructions.name: verify
docs: Verify a Groth16 proof for the aggregate_sum circuit (N=8, 1 public signal).
On success: ix succeeds with no state change. Verifier programs are pure
dispatchers; the calling program records the proof receipt.

errors.name: WrongSignalCount
errors.msg: public signals length does not match circuit shape
